features.description: TSX and frontend UI output are out of current conformance scope; TypeScript/npm remains the governed Node contract surface.
features.title: Out-of-bounds TSX/UI parity target

features.description: Govern GitHub Releases as a partial current publish target that requires workflow-backed evidence before implemented status.
features.title: Target Publish GitHub Releases

features.description: Govern PyPI as a partial current publish target that requires workflow-backed evidence before implemented status.
features.title: Target Publish PyPI

features.description: Govern npmjs as a partial current publish target that requires workflow-backed evidence before implemented status.
features.title: Target Publish npmjs

features.description: Govern crates.io as a partial current publish target that remains blocked from implemented while cargo publish verification debt exists.
features.title: Target Publish crates.io

features.description: Track temporary cargo publish --no-verify debt that blocks crates.io publish target implementation.
features.title: Debt Publish crates.io No Verify

features.description: Represent lifespan.shutdown.failed as an ASGI-compatible schema/codegen contract surface without a runtime emission mandate.
features.title: Target Lifespan Shutdown Failed Contract

features.description: Track RFC 8785/JCS canonical artifact and snapshot behavior as a testable contract leaf.
features.title: Target JSON Canonical Artifacts

features.description: Track duplicate-key rejection for canonical JSON paths as a testable contract leaf.
features.title: Target JSON Duplicate Key Canonical Paths
